title: SLOVENIA enforcement action against Legal Person (13,491)
summary: Insufficient technical and organisational measures to ensure information security The Slovenian DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 13,491 on a legal person. The controller failed to implement adequate technical and organisational measures to ensure data security by not using a sufficient randomisation method, which allowed unauthorised persons...
